name: Avory Room
description: Original wide-plank hardwood floors and low-slung, sloped plaster ceilings evoke a peaceful, nostalgic atmosphere.

name: Brunning Room
description: Immerse yourself in moody, vintage elegance in this beautifully appointed guest room, where classic design meets deep, comforting tones.
amenities: Private bathroom with bathtub and headshower

name: Blue Room
description: Bright, serene, and bursting with classic cottagecore elegance, this guest room balances blues with warm, natural wood tones to create the ultimate restful escape.

name: Grand Deluxe
description: Steeped in atmospheric, old-world luxury and regal character, this expansive master suite blends dramatic jewel tones with classic mid-century and antique elements for a truly grand escape.

name: Magnolia Room
description: Exuding country-inn aesthetic, this spacious room combines soothing earth tones with classic cottage elements to create a restful haven for family or friends traveling together.
amenities: Private bathroom with bathtub and showerhead

name: Sophie Room
description: Steeped in stately elegance and classic character, this room balances rich, heirloom wood craftsmanship with soft, historical blue-green tones for a regal yet comforting retreat.
